base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_transform_dragonfly — a character from 1981 galaga. Challenging-stage variant — dragonfly shape. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Challenging-stage variant — dragonfly shape; bonus wave enemies
